subject: A large wooden trebuchet siege weapon being operated by armored figures on a fortified rampart, with a flaming projectile arcing into the sky
description: A massive timber trebuchet dominates the foreground, its long throwing arm arcing upward as crew members in armor work the machinery atop a stone rampart. A flaming ball of brimstone or pitch is launched into the bright sky, trailing fire. The palette is warm and sun-bleached — ochres, burnt orange, dusty browns, with the sky washed in pale gold. Wooden beams, ropes, and counterweight construction are clearly visible. The scene reads as a medieval siege in active operation, framed in mid-action.
foreground: wooden trebuchet siege engine with throwing arm raised, armored crew operating it
background: pale gold sky with arcing fireball trailing smoke, distant fortification silhouettes
